furnitures.name: psx_wooden_table
furnitures.description: A sturdy wooden dining table with a warm, natural finish that highlights its rich grain patterns. Its clean rectangular design and solid legs make it a versatile piece, perfect for everyday meals or gatherings.

furnitures.name: office_table_desk
furnitures.description: A sleek wooden office desk featuring a spacious tabletop and built-in storage, including multiple drawers and a side cabinet. Designed with a modern two-tone finish, it offers both style and practicality—perfect for home offices, study spaces, or professional work environments.

furnitures.name: serving_table_01
furnitures.description: An elegant dark wood console table featuring a classic design with turned legs and a raised back edge. The two-tier structure provides extra storage space, making it perfect for entryways, living rooms, or hallways while adding a touch of traditional charm.

furnitures.name: victorian_style_tabledesk
furnitures.description: A sophisticated dark wood executive desk featuring intricate carved details and a rich, polished finish. With multiple spacious drawers for organized storage and a sturdy build, it's perfect for creating a classic and professional workspace.

furnitures.name: hexagonal_table_01
furnitures.description: A compact wooden side table with a unique hexagonal top and sturdy vertical slat design. Finished in a warm, rich tone, it features a lower shelf for added storage—perfect for living rooms, bedrooms, or small spaces needing both style and function.

furnitures.name: realistic_bed_3d_model
furnitures.description: A sleek, modern platform bed featuring a sculpted wooden base with smooth, organic curves and a low-profile design. The softly upholstered headboard adds comfort and elegance, while the neutral tones create a calm, minimalist aesthetic—perfect for contemporary and Japandi-inspired bedrooms.

furnitures.name: paper_mario_sticker_star_luxurious_bed
furnitures.description: An elegant canopy bed featuring ornate carved detailing and luxurious red drapery. Designed with a classic, regal aesthetic, it combines a sturdy frame with rich fabrics and decorative accents to create a cozy yet sophisticated centerpiece for any bedroom.

furnitures.name: ornate_carved_bed
furnitures.description: An elegant, vintage-inspired wooden bed frame featuring rich dark wood tones and intricate hand-carved details. The ornate headboard and decorative footboard are complemented by turned posts, creating a timeless, luxurious look—blending traditional craftsmanship with refined style.

furnitures.name: bed
furnitures.description: A sleek, modern platform bed featuring a sculpted wooden base with smooth, organic curves and a low-profile design. The softly upholstered headboard adds comfort and elegance, while the neutral tones create a calm, minimalist aesthetic—perfect for contemporary and Japandi-inspired bedrooms.

furnitures.name: majesty_palm_plant
furnitures.description: Add a tropical touch to your space with this elegant Areca Palm (Dypsis lutescens). Featuring lush, feathery fronds and a vibrant green look, it instantly brightens any room. Known for its air-purifying qualities and easy care, perfect for homes, offices, or creating a relaxing, resort-like vibe indoors.

furnitures.name: house_palm_plant
furnitures.description: Enhance your space with this elegant potted plant featuring large, heart-shaped green leaves that create a bold yet calming presence. Set in a smooth, minimalist pot, it's perfect for adding a modern, natural touch to any room or workspace with effortless style.

furnitures.name: aglaonema_plant
furnitures.description: Add a pop of color to your space with this vibrant ornamental houseplant. Featuring striking pink and green variegated leaves, it brings a fresh, modern look to any room. Housed in a sleek, minimalist pot, it's perfect for desks, shelves, or tabletops—and requires minimal upkeep for lasting beauty.

furnitures.name: low-poly_snake_plant
furnitures.description: Bring effortless greenery into your space with this stylish Snake Plant (Sansevieria trifasciata). Featuring striking upright leaves with natural green variegation, it's both modern and timeless. Low-maintenance and air-purifying, it thrives in a variety of lighting conditions—perfect for homes, offices, or gifting.

furnitures.name: airport_plant
furnitures.description: Bring a fresh, natural touch to your space with this stylish potted greenery. Featuring lush, vibrant leaves set in a sleek rectangular planter, it adds a modern decorative accent to homes, offices, or patios. Perfect for creating a calm, inviting atmosphere with minimal effort.

furnitures.name: ikea_lamp
furnitures.description: A sleek and elegant floor lamp featuring a slim metallic stand and a classic tapered fabric shade. Its minimalist design adds a warm, ambient glow to any living space, making it perfect for modern or traditional interiors.

furnitures.name: desk_lamp
furnitures.description: A sleek and functional desk lamp featuring an adjustable arm and angled shade for precise lighting. Crafted with a sturdy metal frame in a matte black finish, it offers both durability and modern style. Ideal for workspaces, study desks, or reading areas.

furnitures.name: retro_lowpoly_lamp
furnitures.description: A stylish table lamp featuring a bold ceramic base with a smooth, sculpted form and a classic tapered fabric shade. Its modern yet timeless design adds a touch of sophistication and warm ambient lighting to any room.

furnitures.name: titanic_lamp
furnitures.description: An ornate candelabra-style lamp featuring multiple candle-like lights set on an intricately detailed base. With its antique-inspired design and rich metallic finish, it adds a luxurious, statement-making glow to classic and elegant interiors.

furnitures.name: barcelona_chair
furnitures.description: A timeless modern lounge chair inspired by iconic mid-century design, featuring tufted black leather upholstery and a sleek stainless steel frame. Its clean lines and cushioned comfort make it a sophisticated statement piece for living rooms, offices, or stylish lounge areas.

furnitures.name: chair
furnitures.description: A sleek wooden chair with a smooth curved backrest and integrated armrests, designed for both comfort and modern appeal. Crafted from light-toned wood with clean lines and a sturdy frame, it's ideal for dining spaces, offices, or minimalist interiors.

furnitures.name: gaming_chair
furnitures.description: A high-performance gaming chair featuring a bold black and orange design with ergonomic contours for maximum comfort. Built with a padded seat, supportive high back, and adjustable armrests, it's perfect for long gaming sessions or office use—combining style, durability, and functionality.

furnitures.name: woven_lounge_chair
furnitures.description: A stylish lounge chair featuring a handwoven natural seat and backrest for a breathable, organic feel. The solid wood frame with sleek armrests adds warmth and durability, while the gently reclined design offers relaxed comfort. Perfect for living rooms, reading corners, or modern rustic interiors.

furnitures.name: old_western_saloon_chair
furnitures.description: A beautifully crafted solid wood armchair featuring a sculpted seat and curved backrest with vertical spindle detailing. Its natural grain and organic form bring warmth and character, making it a perfect addition to rustic, farmhouse, or timeless interiors.

furnitures.name: leather_chair
furnitures.description: A stylish upholstered armchair featuring a warm tan finish and sleek black metal legs. Its gently curved backrest and cushioned seat provide both comfort and support, making it an ideal choice for dining areas, home offices, or modern living spaces.

furnitures.name: vintage_zen_dining_chair
furnitures.description: A sleek and modern dining chair featuring a tufted brown leather-look seat and back for comfort and style. Its sturdy metal sled base adds a contemporary touch while providing lasting support. Perfect for dining rooms, offices, or any space needing a refined, minimalist accent.

furnitures.name: chair (1)
furnitures.description: A sleek, modern accent chair featuring a sculptural silhouette and smooth, curved lines. Upholstered in rich brown fabric, it offers a minimalist, armless design that blends comfort with contemporary style—perfect for living rooms, bedrooms, or stylish lounge spaces.

furnitures.name: alko_chair
furnitures.description: A modern, minimalist lounge chair featuring a smooth, continuous bent-wood frame that wraps elegantly around a plush, upholstered seat. Designed for both comfort and style, its sculptural form adds a warm, natural touch to any contemporary space.

furnitures.name: antique_heriz_8708_golden_horn_beige_rugs
furnitures.description: A modern abstract area rug featuring a soft blend of neutral tones with subtle blue accents. Its distressed pattern adds a contemporary, lived-in look, making it perfect for elevating living rooms, bedrooms, or office spaces with effortless style and comfort.

furnitures.name: mat
furnitures.description: A simple, functional floor mat suitable for entryways, kitchens, or any high-traffic area. Its clean, minimal design complements a variety of interior styles.
